summary.plain_language: The repository has a usable personal benchmark foundation: 26 locally runnable tasks, five SWE-bench metadata records quarantined as external_frozen, and thirteen suites. comprehensive-screening-v1 gives one resumable command for a fixed 11-task local cohort plus a 9-task SWE-bench Verified hard cohort and one diagnostic tail, while deliberately separating local multidimensional scores from official resolution rate. Codex, Aider, Claude Code, opencode, Grok, and MimoCode have built-in adapter contracts. Mimo JSONL token/cost telemetry is captured conservatively, while a missing Mimo model field remains pending rather than guessed. The corpus has baseline/reference contrast for 21 records, but five dependency-heavy container tasks still need the same Docker-backed corpus audit and no task is empirically selection-ready yet.

items.title: Compare different harnesses with the same model
evidence: run-matrix supports adapter x canonical model x budget profile combinations
model registry maps canonical models to harness-specific CLI identifiers
model_identity records verified_match, requested_unverified, or mismatch
Configured external CLI adapters require an explicit local registry; documentation examples are not listed as runnable
remaining: Run three-repeat real harnesses with a registry-backed verified same model

items.title: Compare current CLI default configurations
evidence: --models unspecified selects cli_default_configurations mode
matrix preflight permits multiple harnesses without a fixed model registry in this mode
saved output reports default_detected or default_unverified identity instead of assuming a model label
remaining: Run repeated real matrices after CLI configuration changes
Add historical default-configuration comparison

items.title: Compare different models under the same harness
evidence: ExperimentConfig records canonical model and adapter invocation model
run-matrix accepts a model registry
Claude JSON smoke parsed actual model, token usage, and cost
remaining: Create user's local mappings and run real comparison matrix

items.title: Rank full harness/model combinations
evidence: run-matrix produces raw aggregation plus comparative-only leaderboard
task-level comparable-score ranking excludes dimensions not evidenced by every repetition in every combination
preflight-matrix checks repetitions, roles, hidden tests, Docker, adapters, and registry mappings before spending tokens
remaining: Add historical cross-matrix comparison
Run real adapters

items.title: Total score and per-dimension scores
evidence: ScoreResult contains strict total, dimensions, verified coverage, and verified-only normalized score
HTML and Markdown reports show evidence status per dimension
remaining: Add causal self-repair, browser, and subagent evidence

items.title: Transparent personal decision index
evidence: balanced-v1 weights local verified-normalized score at 55% and official SWE resolution rate at 45%
profile content and SHA-256 fingerprint are stored in suite summaries
repetition, local coverage, and official scorable-attempt gates label incomplete evidence provisional or unavailable
the index does not alter local scorecards, radar charts, or official evaluator tracks
remaining: Add a user-frozen alternative profile only for a genuinely different selection objective

items.title: Radar chart
evidence: HTML report includes SVG radar snapshot
remaining: Improve styling after more dimensions have real scores

items.title: Repeated runs with mean and variance
evidence: run and run-suite support repetitions
summary includes mean, variance, stdev, best, worst
task summaries include two-sided 95% Student-t confidence intervals for repeated measurements
remaining: Add paired significance tests once larger matched matrices exist

items.title: No fake scoring; every score backed by evidence
evidence: Public tests, hidden tests, protected-file hashes, static and browser visual checks, planning artifact checks, and task-contract fingerprints are evidence-backed
Reports distinguish verified, heuristic, and unavailable dimensions
Unimplemented or unevidenced dimensions remain 0
cost/token telemetry is recorded but cost_efficiency requires a predeclared task budget, never a tool-count or arbitrary dollar proxy
model identity status, selected invocation value, low-budget Claude startup probe, configured-but-unverified defaults, and observed model drift are persisted
external_frozen records are rejected by generic runs and local ranking
SWE-bench evaluator error_ids are explicitly unscoreable evaluator_error states
172 unittest test functions cover framework and scoring behavior
remaining: Replace trace heuristics with causal repair/tool/subagent evidence
Complete Docker-backed corpus audit for dependency-heavy tasks

items.title: Evidence-backed planning/process scoring seed
evidence: process_checks supports planning file evidence
process-planning task scores planning from .agent-benchmark/plan.md
remaining: Extend process checks and make self-repair evidence less keyword-dependent

items.title: Public tests plus hidden/private acceptance tests
evidence: hidden_test_command is supported
All 26 locally evaluable task definitions currently include hidden tests
Reports show public_test_passed and hidden_test_passed
remaining: Keep hidden tests independent as new comparable tasks are added

items.title: Timeout protection for public and hidden tests
evidence: TaskSpec supports test_timeout_seconds
Timed out tests are recorded as failed evidence
remaining: Tune default timeouts per suite as tasks become heavier

items.title: Detect modified or deleted benchmark tests
evidence: Protected paths are checked with SHA-256 baseline/current hashes
remaining: Add policy levels for invalid run vs penalty

items.title: Visual verification for UI tasks
evidence: visual_checks supports static HTML checks
browser_screenshot uses Playwright Chromium, rendered-selector visibility, PNG artifacts, and pixel statistics
frontend-visual has browser visual evidence
remaining: Add server-backed pages, interactions, reference-image diffs, and mobile viewport coverage

items.title: Cost and duration tracking
evidence: Run, adapter, and test durations are aggregated
Parsed cost/token fields are carried into per-run and mean summary fields when harness output exposes them
remaining: Improve provider-specific token/cost parsing and report rendering

items.title: Task corpus, difficulty ladder, and domain coverage
evidence: Repository contains 26 locally evaluable task definitions plus 5 external_frozen metadata records
all manifests declare validated difficulty and provenance
catalog keeps external_frozen records source-separated and non-runnable
difficulty calibration groups only identified model evidence, matching task fingerprints, and three runs per combination
python-bugfix and c-bugfix are deliberately smoke_only and excluded from leaderboard scoring
embedded and optics have domain_seed tasks
remaining: Complete Docker corpus audit
Run empirical calibration for every comparative task
Add official-evaluator benchmark tasks with preserved evaluator evidence

items.title: Discriminatory screening gate and hard-to-easy ladder
evidence: selection-ladder orders tasks expert to easy
screening-report separates warmup, corpus-gated, under-sampled, retune, official-evaluator, and selection-ready states
selection readiness requires corpus audit plus empirical three-repeat identified-model evidence
remaining: Collect enough real evidence to populate a selection-ready cohort
Add imported authoritative tasks through their official evaluators

items.title: Embedded engineering and optics represented
evidence: embedded-c, embedded-protocol-parser, optics-python, and optics-imaging-pipeline seed tasks exist
remaining: Add deeper domain tasks: protocols, memory safety, timing, calibration, imaging simulation

items.title: Outcome capability scorecard
evidence: taxonomy command maps tasks to outcome axes
suite summaries aggregate software engineering, agent workflow, systems/embedded, scientific computing, web/UI, and security/reliability
smoke_only tasks are excluded from comparative axis scores
default audit includes baseline/reference corpus quality verification
remaining: Add authoritative external benchmark tracks to each applicable axis

items.title: Budget profiles such as oneshot and open_ended
evidence: ExperimentConfig records budget_profile
run-matrix accepts multiple budget profiles
profile max_duration_seconds becomes an adapter subprocess timeout unless explicitly overridden
open_ended clears stale budget timeout state
remaining: Enforce adapter-independent attempt and tool-call limits where harness telemetry permits

items.title: Resume interrupted task experiments
evidence: experiment_manifest.json and checkpoint.json are written before first harness execution
Ctrl-C persists run.interrupted evidence and interruption.json before leaving an experiment resumable
resume command reuses completed result.json files and only runs missing repetitions
suite_manifest.json and task_summaries persist completed suite tasks
resume-suite only runs tasks with missing saved summaries
matrix_manifest.json and per-combination summaries persist matrix progress
resume-matrix reuses saved combinations and nested suite checkpoints
remaining: Add an optional historical recovery browser

items.title: Real coding-agent adapters
evidence: Built-in default command templates exist for Codex, Aider, Claude Code, opencode, Grok, and MimoCode
doctor detects local opencode, Claude Code, Grok, and MimoCode versions
command templates support instruction_file, prompt, workspace, canonical model, and adapter model env
Mimo JSONL parser records explicit input/output token and cost values without inventing a model identity
detected_model and model_identity are in summaries
Historic unversioned results are excluded from current selection statistics
remaining: Rerun fingerprinted smoke checks
Run larger registry-backed benchmark matrices
Improve provider-specific tool trace parsing
Handle provider-specific permissions and interaction behavior

items.title: Low-cost real opencode and Claude Code smoke tests
evidence: real-smoke suite exists
audit --include-real-harness exists
Historic smoke artifacts are retained for adapter debugging but excluded from current calibration because they predate task fingerprints
remaining: Rerun fingerprinted smoke checks
Expand beyond smoke tasks

items.title: Clean isolated environment per run
evidence: Each repetition copies task workspace into a run directory
container_required tasks generate a Dockerfile with exact package versions and persist image/build evidence; Colima Docker is ready and python-fullstack has container evidence
container test commands use task-specific network policy, CPU/memory limits, a writable workspace mount, and a read-only hidden-test mount
remaining: Pin base-image digests before authoritative comparisons
Add dependency cache lifecycle and cleanup policy

items.title: Logs and replayable evidence
evidence: trace.jsonl, result.json, diff.patch, stdout.log, stderr.log are written per run
remaining: Add replay viewer/dashboard
Add richer harness tool traces where available

items.title: Handoff and development journal
evidence: docs/handoff.md, docs/project_journal.md, docs/corpus_strategy.md, docs/developer_guide.md, and docs/next_agent_prompt.md are maintained
remaining: Keep updating after each meaningful phase

items.title: One-command project self-audit
evidence: agent-benchmark audit runs validation, unit tests, compileall, and foundation smoke suite
Audit reports are saved under runs/audit-*
remaining: Add optional lint, Docker smoke, browser screenshot, and real harness dry-run audit levels

items.title: Local environment and harness diagnostics
evidence: agent-benchmark doctor checks python3, node, cc, opencode, claude, Playwright Chromium, Docker daemon readiness, and adapter command env vars
remaining: Add provider credential checks without printing secrets
Report active container runtime name when Docker is ready

items.title: Coding-agent-style terminal TUI and recoverable run status
evidence: SuiteProgress receives real task title/id, repetition, workspace/environment lifecycle, parser-derived detected-model events, configured-but-unverified hints, and saved startup-probe identity

Wide interactive terminals render a coloured centered alternate-screen transcript view with visible model identity, real workspace mutations, differential row refresh, and an 80x24 no-scroll regression
Compact/plain/dumb terminal modes degrade safely and full TUI restores the terminal on completion

Each live suite atomically updates suite-*/live_status.json with display mode, activity, recent attempts, requested/adapter/observed model fields, configured hint, startup-probe source, and multi-model drift
The primary launcher command keeps the CLI default model, while model/suite/repetition flags remain optional advanced overrides
remaining: Stream only safe, non-sensitive harness tool events when adapters expose them
Add a dashboard live-run view as part of future desktop productization

items.title: Consumer-friendly setup and standalone native macOS application
evidence: The benchmark launcher can run doctor/preflight and write a completed experiment into the current result directory
The current workflow still assumes the user prepared runtimes, dependencies, Docker, CLI harnesses, and provider authentication
remaining: Add pre-run readiness diagnosis without exposing secrets
Automatically repair supported prerequisites with confirmation for networked, privileged, or authentication actions
Remove environment-variable knowledge from the normal path
Build and verify a standalone native macOS application for setup, harness status, result-folder selection, runs, progress/logs, recovery/history, and dashboard access

items.title: Copy-paste prompt for the next coding agent
evidence: docs/next_agent_prompt.md exists
agent-benchmark next-agent-prompt prints it
remaining: Keep it updated whenever workflow rules change

items.title: SWE-bench, Terminal-Bench, WebArena, OSWorld style imports
evidence: Task manifests carry validated provenance metadata
docs/corpus_strategy.md defines source-separated tracks and prerequisite order
project-owned Docker evaluator v1 is implemented
preflight-authoritative validates the SWE-bench Verified and Terminal-Bench Core registry plus local Docker/tool readiness without claiming an import
SWE-bench and Terminal-Bench toolchains are installed in isolated local environments and live preflight reports both execution-ready
freeze-authoritative-pilot verifies both six-instance pilots against upstream commit/revision metadata and records hashed raw snapshots
swebench-bridge creates a resumable per-instance harness-patch to official evaluator evidence chain only after explicit execution
A real expert SWE-bench bridge reached the official evaluator; Colima was raised to 8GiB and the saved patch is being re-evaluated
terminal-bench-bridge plans or executes one pilot task through official tb run on a separate track
external_frozen records require external_evaluator_only and cannot be scored by the generic runner
external pilot schema permits ranking_candidate tasks only before a diagnostic_tail and requires at least three ranking candidates
remaining: Finish a scoreable SWE-bench instance report from the resumed patch evaluation
Execute and classify the first Terminal-Bench pilot task end-to-end

items.title: Dashboard and historical comparison
evidence: agent-benchmark dashboard builds dashboard.json and index.html from saved runs
Completed run, suite, matrix, and resume CLI paths refresh the dashboard automatically
The executable ./benchmark launcher creates an external result root, runs preflight, and opens the dashboard on macOS
Surfaces matrix leaderboards, suite/task summaries, and SWE-bench bridge evaluator_error classification
Labels fingerprint match/mismatch and provisional CLI-default identity so historical evidence is not overclaimed
remaining: Optional live server or interactive filters
Cross-matrix historical trend charts once more fingerprinted matrices exist
